emails.subject: NDA's
emails.body: Tana, I need three NDA's drafted and I would like to see at least one of them before being sent. Monterey Designs Systems, Inc. 894 Ross Drive, Suite 100 Sunnyvale, CA 94089-1443 Phone: 408 548 4681 Fax: 408 747 7377 Signer: Bill Alexander VP Marketing email:bill@mondes.com Softknot Corporation 46500 Fremont Blvd, Ste 716 Fremont, California 94538 Signer: Mo Mohaved, CEO Founder Phone:510 226 3750 Fax:510 226 2776 email:mmovahed@softknot.com GreenAsh Corporation 38 Watermill Sugarland, TX 77479 Signer: Vinh Nguyen, CEO Founder Phone 281 989 9823 Fax: 419 831 0787 email:vnguyen@greenash.com thanks pf

emails.subject: Re: NDA's
emails.body: Re: NDA's What is the nature of the confidential information being discussed? Will our standard language "...furnished in connection with a possible transaction or other business relationship..." suffice, or do you want to be more specific? Also, do you want the bilateral form? Paul Finken/ENRON@enronXgate 02/21/2001 11:18 AM

emails.subject: Re: NDA's

emails.subject: RE: NDA's
emails.body: RE: NDA's We are going to be discussing a potential joint business venture around a technology company. I suspect the standard language that is being used by the originators in Rex Shelby's group would suffice. Also, the bilateral form is best as they will be sharing information about the industry and their companies experience in the industry. pf
